overview: A professional portfolio website with a public showcase — hero, featured projects, about, and contact sections — plus an authenticated admin dashboard for managing all portfolio content.
features: Hero section with name, title, and call-to-action
Projects grid with detail pages, tech tags, and links
About section with bio and profile photo
Admin dashboard secured with Internet Identity
Add, edit, and delete projects with image upload
Light/dark mode toggle persisted to local storage
